allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files'' -Filter ''NinjaTrader*'' -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files \(x86\)'' -Filter ''NinjaTrader*'' -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files\\NinjaTrader 8\\bin'' -Filter ''*compil*'' -Recurse | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files\\NinjaTrader 8\\bin'' -Filter ''*NinjaScript*'' -Recurse | Select-Object FullName")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5199 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, State, OwningProcess, @{Name=''ProcessName'';Expression={\(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess\).ProcessName}}")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5199 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, RemoteAddress, RemotePort, State, OwningProcess")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5199 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table LocalAddress, LocalPort, RemoteAddress, RemotePort, State, OwningProcess -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Id 100860 | Select-Object ProcessName,Id; Get-Process -Id 79392 | Select-Object ProcessName,Id")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name python3.11 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name python -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; ''Killed''")
